# DiSalvo Law Office

> Criminal defense law firm in Fresno, California, led by attorney Mario DiSalvo. Over 20 years of experience defending clients against misdemeanor and felony charges. Free consultations, available 24/7.

- Attorney: Mario DiSalvo
- Location: 5151 N Palm Ave, Suite 100, Fresno, CA 93704
- Phone: (559) 442-1552
- Email: mario@disalvolaw.com
- Availability: Open 24/7, free consultation, flexible payment plans

## Practice Areas

- [Criminal Defense](https://www.disalvo-law.com/pg/criminal-defense-fresno): Misdemeanors to serious felonies — assault, drug crimes, weapons charges.
- [DUI Defense](https://www.disalvo-law.com/pg/dui-defense-fresno): Challenging breathalyzer results, field sobriety tests, and unlawful stops.
- [Felony Defense](https://www.disalvo-law.com/pg/felony-defense-fresno): Reducing charges, securing acquittals, protecting your future.
- [Domestic Violence Defense](https://www.disalvo-law.com/pg/domestic-violence-defense-fresno): Defense against domestic violence allegations.
- [Drug Crimes](https://www.disalvo-law.com/pg/drug-crimes-fresno): Defense for possession, distribution, and related charges.

- [Fresno](https://www.disalvo-law.com/pg/fresno-criminal-defense-lawyer)
